summary: Set the Cookie header from the stored cookie string when the HTTP client has no jar, so cookie-auth requests actually carry the captured session.
reason: Generated cookie-auth client built a nil cookie jar and left the request-path cookie block comment-only (referencing a nonexistent LoadCookieJar), so every authenticated request 401'd despite a valid captured session.
validated_outcome: Live GET /app/category/{type} and /api/* returned 200 against the real site after the fix; verified end-to-end.
